_comment: NPC: Xu Liqing (Six-Desire Devil) (徐立清 / 六欲魔尊). Canon ID: N92. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Xu Liqing (Six-Desire Devil)

perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Master of desire manipulation; Soul Transformation perfect circle

note: Six-Desire Devil Venerable; major Soul Refining antagonist

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.
